PARAM.description: the Unicode code point to escape if necessary
PARAM.name: cp
PARAM.content: the Unicode code point to escape if necessary

RETURN.description: the replacement characters, or null if no escaping was needed.
RETURN.content: replacement characters, or @code null if no escaping was needed.

PARAM.description: a sequence of characters, not null
PARAM.name: csq

PARAM.description: the index of the first character to be scanned
PARAM.name: start
PARAM.content: the index of the first character to be scanned

PARAM.description: the index immediately after the last character to be scanned
PARAM.name: end
PARAM.content: the index immediately after the last character to be scanned

THROWS.description: the scanned sub-sequence of csq contains invalid surrogate pairs
THROWS.name: IllegalArgumentException
THROWS.content: if the scanned sub-sequence of @code csq contains invalid surrogate pairs

PARAM.description: the literal string to be escaped
PARAM.name: string
PARAM.content: the literal string to be escaped

RETURN.description: the escaped form of a given literal string.
RETURN.content: the escaped form of a given literal string.

THROWS.description: if invalid surrogate characters are encountered
THROWS.name: IllegalArgumentException
THROWS.content: if invalid surrogate characters are encountered

PARAM.description: the literal string to be escaped
PARAM.name: s
PARAM.content: the literal string to be escaped

PARAM.description: the index to start escaping from
PARAM.name: index
PARAM.content: the index to start escaping from

RETURN.description: the escaped form of a given literal string, starting at the given index.
RETURN.content: the escaped form of a given literal string, starting at the given index.

THROWS.description: if invalid surrogate characters are encountered
THROWS.name: IllegalArgumentException
THROWS.content: if invalid surrogate characters are encountered

PARAM.description: the sequence of characters from which to decode the code point
PARAM.name: seq

PARAM.description: the index of the first character to decode
PARAM.name: index

PARAM.description: the index beyond the last valid character to decode
PARAM.name: end
PARAM.content: greater than or equal to the index

RETURN.description: Unicode code point for the given index or the negated value of the trailing high surrogate character at the end of the sequence
RETURN.content: Unicode code point for the given index or the negated value of the trailing high surrogate character at the end of the sequence
